title: Buffer pH Interactive Calculator
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Interactive Henderson-Hasselbalch calculator for computing buffer pH and designing component ratios for target pH values.

learningObjectives: Compute buffer pH from [HA], [A-], and pKa using Henderson-Hasselbalch.
Determine the [A-]/[HA] ratio required to achieve a target pH.
prerequisites: Understanding of weak acid/conjugate base pairs

keyQuestions: What ratio is required for a specific target pH?
commonMisconceptions: Buffers work regardless of pKa proximity to the target pH.
Increasing both HA and A- equally changes pH.
assessmentOpportunities: Students design a buffer at a specific pH and report required ratios.
Learners compare pH responses of different buffer systems.
